name: stranded-booking-remediator
description: Stranded_Booking_Remediator — scheduling sub-phase B Task B11. Coordinator-offboarding stranded-booking remediation (canonical §7.3): detects bookings left stranded when a coordinator departs (status='booked' AND coordinator_email=departed AND last_calendar_mutation_at<offboarding_time, via the tenantId-coordinator_email-index GSI) and applies one of three handlings — (a) reassign via re-run routing, (b) treat as coordinator-side cancel, (c) leave — or the default cascade (a)->(b). Backend callable operations; admin UI deferred. Trigger wiring + IaC are the integrator's.

scripts.package: npm run build && zip -j deployment.zip dist/index.js
